shopping_0.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to correctly identify a "red" blanket. shopping_0.REFLECTION: When a specific color is required for a product, always verify the color through the product description or by clear visual confirmation from the image. Do not assume a product with accents of the required color fulfills the primary color requirement. First, filter or identify all products matching the color, then compare prices among those specific items to find the least expensive.
